reviews.author: Sebastien
reviews.text: We had the pleasure of spending two unforgettable days aboard Limitless this summer in Palma de Mallorca, and the experience exceeded every expectation. From the warm welcome by Captain Luigi and his crew to the impeccable service throughout our journey, every detail was executed flawlessly. Our group of 11 was so impressed that we immediately chartered the yacht again the following week—an experience that only reinforced how consistently outstanding the service truly is. If you're considering a yacht charter in Mallorca, I can recommend Limitless without hesitation. Captain Luigi, Laura, and the entire team combine professionalism, attention to detail, and genuine hospitality to create an experience that is both seamless and memorable.

reviews.author: Maurice
reviews.text: An unforgettable day and definitely one of the highlights of our stay in Mallorca. The service Luigi and Laura provided was absolutely amazing — we felt incredibly well looked after throughout the entire trip. Everything was perfect: the boat, the atmosphere, the hospitality, and especially the way they both took care of us. Simply wonderful people who made this experience truly special. Thank you again for everything.

reviews.author: Andrew
reviews.text: Lovely boat with lots of room for the 8 of us. Luigi (skipper) and Rebecca could not have been more welcoming and they made the difference to the quality and enjoyment of our day. Professional, thoughtful but also relaxed and fun. Thanks

reviews.author: Tony
reviews.text: Our group of six had a fantastic day on Limitless, which was spacious, comfortable, and spotless. Paul was highly responsive and organized our charter with less than a day's notice. Once on board, we found Captain Luigi to be both knowledgeable and humorous, and he seamlessly mapped out a smooth itinerary with several fun stops. Throughout the charter, the attentive stewardess made sure we were well taken care of, whether it was bringing us a (very well-stocked) basket of sunscreen and towels or keeping our drinks topped off and bringing them to us wherever we went. Highly recommend!
